note: Maps the SRO results parser's event names (venue-style: 'Circuit Paul Ricard', 'Brands Hatch') to canonical rounds.json round numbers — the parser emits no round numbers (gap noted since 0.25.0). 'match' is a case-insensitive substring test against eventName, tolerant of SRO naming variance; accented venues use unambiguous fragments. No match → no round → rows render unlinked (the pre-map behavior).
